phrases.intent_en: Ask if non-guests may visit the interior
phrases.text_local: Est-il possible pour les non-résidents de visiter l'intérieur de l'hôtel ?
phrases.pronunciation: eh-TEEL po-SEEBL poor lay non ray-ZEE-dan deh vee-zee-TAY lan-tay-RYUHR deh lo-TEL
phrases.cultural_note: The Negresco's public areas contain an extraordinary art collection. Non-guests may enter the lobby and Salon Royal.

responses.english: Yes, the lobby is open to visitors.
responses.phonetic: wee luh OHL eh too-VAIR oh veez-ee-TUR
responses.local: Oui, le hall est ouvert aux visiteurs.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the hotel bar is open to non-guests
phrases.text_local: Le bar de l'hôtel est ouvert aux visiteurs extérieurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh BAR duh loh-TEL eh too-VAIR oh veez-ee-TUR ex-tay-RYUR
phrases.cultural_note: The Negresco's bar is open to non-guests and offers a chance to experience the hotel's lavish interior without booking a room.

responses.english: Yes, the bar is open to everyone.
responses.phonetic: wee luh BAR eh too-VAIR ah TOO
responses.local: Oui, le bar est ouvert à tous.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a reservation at the Chantecler restaurant
phrases.text_local: Souhaitez-vous me réserver une table au restaurant Le Chantecler ?
phrases.pronunciation: sweh-TAY voo meh ray-sehr-VAY oon TAB-leh oh res-to-RAN leh shan-teh-KLEHR
phrases.cultural_note: Le Chantecler is the Negresco's gastronomic restaurant — one of the finest on the Riviera, with Michelin recognition.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how much a room costs per night
phrases.text_local: Quel est le tarif d'une chambre pour une nuit, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh leh tah-REEF doon SHAM-breh poor oon NWEE seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Negresco is one of France's grand historic palaces — rooms start at several hundred euros per night.

responses.phonetic: lay tah-REEF sohn soor luh SEET ahn-tair-NET
responses.local: Les tarifs sont sur le site internet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how much afternoon tea costs
phrases.text_local: C'est combien le thé de l'après-midi ?
phrases.pronunciation: say kohm-BYAHN luh TAY duh lah-PRAY-mee-DEE
phrases.cultural_note: Afternoon tea at a grand hotel is a refined experience. Expect formal service with pastries, finger sandwiches and a selection of teas.

responses.phonetic: lay tah-REEF sohn tah-fee-SHAY ah lah-KUY
responses.local: Les tarifs sont affichés à l'accueil.
